title: jasione montana subsp. maritima
intro: Jasione montana subsp. maritima, also known as sea jay or sea bellflower, is a subspecies of the Jasione montana plant, a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Jasione montana subsp. maritima include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
